---
title: "Software"
description: >-
  Open-source research software by Natalia Gumińska: R packages for nanopore
  direct RNA sequencing and laboratory data infrastructure.
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
R packages for nanopore direct RNA sequencing, and the databases that keep
laboratory data usable. Most of it is open source under
[LRB-IIMCB](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB), with personal projects on
[my GitHub](https://github.com/nemitheasura).
:::

## Packages and tools

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
### ninetails <span class="status-badge status-active">author</span>
Detects non-adenosine residues in poly(A) tails from Oxford Nanopore direct RNA
reads, using a convolutional network on signal-derived images.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [Nanopore]{.pill} [Deep learning]{.pill} [Signal analysis]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
[Docs](https://lrb-iimcb.github.io/ninetails/){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-57787-6){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
### nanotail2 <span class="status-badge status-active">author</span>
Poly(A) tail length analysis: distributions, comparisons between conditions, and
publication figures.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [poly(A)]{.pill} [Statistics]{.pill} [Visualisation]{.pill}
:::

[Organisation](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
### rDNAmine <span class="status-badge status-active">co-author</span>
Analysis of long repetitive rDNA sequences in Oxford Nanopore reads.

::: {.tag-row}
[Shell]{.pill} [Long reads]{.pill} [rDNA]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/rDNA_mine){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1002/yea.70023){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
### NanoQuRe <span class="status-badge status-maintained">contributor</span>
Quality control reports for nanopore sequencing runs.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [Quality control]{.pill} [Reporting]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/NanoQuRe){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
### lachesis <span class="status-badge status-maintained">contributor</span>
Part of the laboratory's toolset for nanopore RNA analysis workflows.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [Workflow]{.pill}
:::

[Organisation](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB){.btn-ghost target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
### Laboratory databases <span class="status-badge status-maintained">maintained</span>
Relational schemas for samples, libraries, sequencing runs and their metadata,
with role-based access and an audit trail.

::: {.tag-row}
[MySQL]{.pill} [PHP]{.pill} [Schema design]{.pill} [Audit logging]{.pill}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="stack.qmd"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i> Stack</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://github.com/nemitheasura" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
:::
